message:
fix(fcp-host): inline admin-state persistence, default signature_valid to false, checked u32 cast

Remove tokio::task::spawn_blocking wrapper for admin-state snapshot
writes since they are already serialized behind persist_lock and the
payload is small, eliminating a Tokio-specific dependency from the
async-core stack.

Default signature_valid to false for unverified token signatures
instead of optimistically assuming validity, matching the existing
comment that signature verification is not yet implemented.

Replace bare as u32 cast with u32::try_from().expect() for the
load-shedder ticket value — the modulo guarantees it fits, but the
explicit conversion satisfies clippy pedantic and documents the
invariant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
